description: Generated from inference/fingerprints/ by tools/seed-fingerprints. Each entry's sha256 is the model.safetensors hash for the named revision. Run `cargo run -p seed-fingerprints -- --model-id <id> --revision <rev>` to refresh after pinning a new model.

fingerprints.note: Retained from Day 4 local round-trip while the registry transition lands. A maintainer with the model cached can rerun `cargo run -p seed-fingerprints` to replace verified_by with `huggingface-lfs+local-recompute`. The on-disk bytes the verifier checks against do not change; only the provenance label does, since the HF LFS oid is itself the SHA-256 of the file.
